MINI MINUTES: Daniel Cortright, Esq., specially appearing for Plaintiff.
Plaintiff's Motion to Continue Arbitration is heard this day. Court ordered motion granted. Case is removed from Arbitration. Trial Date of 4/29/2002 at 9:30 AM, in dept 206 is ordered set. Court to give Ntc. of Trl date and to give Ntc. of MSC. Moving party to submit a proposed order within five days. Proceedings reported by: Ron Sinclair. (212)
